chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C.P No. S-363 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections ‘A’. 2. For hearing of main case. 17-10-2025 Mr. Akram Kamboh, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Aftab Nek Muhammad Bhutto, Assistant A.G. Mr. Sardar Ali Solangi, D.P.G for the State. ************** Respondents No.2 and 3 have filed their respective statements/comments, which are taken on record. 2. Mr. Suhail Ahmed Veesar, Advocate, files Vakalatnama on behalf of respondents No.5 to 8, along with a statement and certain annexed documents. The same are taken on record. Copies thereof have been supplied to learned counsel for the petitioner. After perusing the documents supplied by learned counsel for respondents No.5 to 8, learned counsel for the petitioner states that he does not press the petition. In view of the above, the petition is dismissed as withdrawn. Judge Irshad Ali M/Steno
